name: Regulatory Compliance
description: Adherence to GDPR, AI Act, data residency, and industry-specific regulations

name: Security Posture
description: SOC2/ISO27001 certification status, penetration test history, incident response

name: Cost Efficiency
description: Total cost of ownership relative to capability tier and contract flexibility

name: Technical Capability
description: Model quality, API reliability, latency SLAs, integration ecosystem

name: Vendor Stability
description: Financial health, runway, customer base diversity, leadership continuity
